table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Obligations for the logical model for medication prescription body for prescribing systems (producer) and dispensing systems (consumer).

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Medication prescription model obligations
Elements defined in Ancestors:header, header, presentedForm, prescriptionItem

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: The person for whom the medication is prescribed/ordered. [Used for searching]

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)

td.span: Business identifier(s) for the prescription. [Used for searching]

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

td.span: The prescriber, the person who made the prescription, and who takes the responsibility for the treatment. [Used for searching]

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Time of issuing (signing) the prescription by health care professional. [Used for searching]

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck100.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Status of authorisation for dispensing the prescription items. This should not be the status of treatment. For a multiple-item prescription, this conveys the aggregate status of the entire prescription. In case of a single-item prescription, prescriptionItem.status shall be the same as EHDSMedicationPrescription.header.status. [Used for searching]

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Entire prescription as issued. Various formats could be provided, PDF format is recommended.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck01.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Prescription line for one medication. In many countries, only one item is allowed and there shall be no expectation to be able to manage multiple items. In case multiple medications are allowed, all items need to be authored together.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

td.span: Identifier for a single item on prescription, if exists. In case of single-item prescription, this identifier is typically the same as prescription identifier. [Used for searching]

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

td.span: Status of a single item of a multi-item prescription. In case of single-item prescriptions, the status of prescription has the same meaning as the status of the item. [Used for searching]

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.span: Prescribed product, branded, generic, virtual, extemporal, etc

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck010.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: The period over which the prescription is considered valid and dispensable. validityPeriod.start is, if missing, is assumed to be the date of issuing the prescription.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck011.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Whether and which type of substitution is allowed for this prescription. The legislation in the country of dispense applies, e.g. if this information is missing.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck0100.png)

span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Whether and to what extent substitution is allowed.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck000.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Additional information or comments, e.g. message to the dispenser

description.value: Obligations for the logical model for medication prescription body for prescribing systems (producer) and dispensing systems (consumer).

short.value: Medication prescription model obligations

definition.value: Obligations for the logical model for medication prescription body for prescribing systems (producer) and dispensing systems (consumer).

short.value: Prescription header

definition.value: Prescription header

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL process the patient information for identification purposes.

short.value: The person for whom the medication is prescribed/ordered. [Used for searching]

definition.value: The person for whom the medication is prescribed/ordered. [Used for searching]

valueMarkdown.value: For a single-item prescription these identifiers SHALL match prescriptionItem.identifier.
System SHALL use this prescription identifier for reference in the dispense record.

short.value: Business identifier(s) for the prescription. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Business identifier(s) for the prescription. [Used for searching]

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL support at least EHDSHealthProfessional data type for the element.

short.value: The prescriber, the person who made the prescription, and who takes the responsibility for the treatment. [Used for searching]

definition.value: The prescriber, the person who made the prescription, and who takes the responsibility for the treatment. [Used for searching]

short.value: Time of issuing (signing) the prescription by health care professional. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Time of issuing (signing) the prescription by health care professional. [Used for searching]

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL process the prescription status together with other information to determine dispensability.

short.value: Status of authorisation for dispensing the prescription items. This should not be the status of treatment. For a multiple-item prescription, this conveys the aggregate status of the entire prescription. In case of a single-item prescription, prescriptionItem.status shall be the same as EHDSMedicationPrescription.header.status. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Status of authorisation for dispensing the prescription items. This should not be the status of treatment. For a multiple-item prescription, this conveys the aggregate status of the entire prescription. In case of a single-item prescription, prescriptionItem.status shall be the same as EHDSMedicationPrescription.header.status. [Used for searching]

short.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

definition.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

short.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

definition.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

short.value: Reason for the current status of prescription, for example the reason why the prescription was made invalid or changed from a previous state.

definition.value: Reason for the current status of prescription, for example the reason why the prescription was made invalid or changed from a previous state.

valueMarkdown.value: System SHOULD be able to provide a rendered, human-readable version of the prescription.

short.value: Entire prescription as issued. Various formats could be provided, PDF format is recommended.

definition.value: Entire prescription as issued. Various formats could be provided, PDF format is recommended.

short.value: Prescription line for one medication. In many countries, only one item is allowed and there shall be no expectation to be able to manage multiple items. In case multiple medications are allowed, all items need to be authored together.

definition.value: Prescription line for one medication. In many countries, only one item is allowed and there shall be no expectation to be able to manage multiple items. In case multiple medications are allowed, all items need to be authored together.

valueMarkdown.value: For a single-item prescription these identifiers SHALL match .identifier.
System SHALL use this prescription identifier for reference in the dispense record.

short.value: Identifier for a single item on prescription, if exists. In case of single-item prescription, this identifier is typically the same as prescription identifier. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Identifier for a single item on prescription, if exists. In case of single-item prescription, this identifier is typically the same as prescription identifier. [Used for searching]

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL process the prescription status together with other information to determine dispensability.

short.value: Status of a single item of a multi-item prescription. In case of single-item prescriptions, the status of prescription has the same meaning as the status of the item. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Status of a single item of a multi-item prescription. In case of single-item prescriptions, the status of prescription has the same meaning as the status of the item. [Used for searching]

short.value: Reason for the current status of prescription, for example the reason why the prescription was made invalid or why the prescription was changed from previous

definition.value: Reason for the current status of prescription, for example the reason why the prescription was made invalid or why the prescription was changed from previous

short.value: Prescribed product, branded, generic, virtual, extemporal, etc

definition.value: Prescribed product, branded, generic, virtual, extemporal, etc

short.value: Reason for the prescription (typically diagnosis, or a procedure)

definition.value: Reason for the prescription (typically diagnosis, or a procedure)

short.value: Intent of the prescription - prophylaxis, treatment, anesthesia, etc

definition.value: Intent of the prescription - prophylaxis, treatment, anesthesia, etc

short.value: Period over which the medication is to be taken (in case of multiple dosage schemes, this would be the overall period of all dosages.)

definition.value: Period over which the medication is to be taken (in case of multiple dosage schemes, this would be the overall period of all dosages.)

short.value: Overall quantity of prescribed product (e.g number of packages or number of tablets).

definition.value: Overall quantity of prescribed product (e.g number of packages or number of tablets).

short.value: Dosage and administration instructions

definition.value: Dosage and administration instructions

short.value: The period over which the prescription is considered valid and dispensable. validityPeriod.start is, if missing, is assumed to be the date of issuing the prescription.

definition.value: The period over which the prescription is considered valid and dispensable. validityPeriod.start is, if missing, is assumed to be the date of issuing the prescription.

short.value: Whether and which type of substitution is allowed for this prescription. The legislation in the country of dispense applies, e.g. if this information is missing.

definition.value: Whether and which type of substitution is allowed for this prescription. The legislation in the country of dispense applies, e.g. if this information is missing.

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL support at least the boolean data type.
System SHALL support at least the boolean data type.

short.value: Whether and to what extent substitution is allowed.

definition.value: Whether and to what extent substitution is allowed.

short.value: Reason for the substitution requirement (e.g. Biological product, Patient allergic to an excipient in alternative products, etc)

definition.value: Reason for the substitution requirement (e.g. Biological product, Patient allergic to an excipient in alternative products, etc)

short.value: Number of refills authorised - how many times the prescription item can be dispensed in addition to the original dispense. The default value is 0 (no repeats).

definition.value: Number of refills authorised - how many times the prescription item can be dispensed in addition to the original dispense. The default value is 0 (no repeats).

short.value: Minimum dispense interval. If a prescription allows for repeated dispensations, the interval between dispensations shall be stated here.

definition.value: Minimum dispense interval. If a prescription allows for repeated dispensations, the interval between dispensations shall be stated here.

short.value: Indicates that the prescriber has knowingly prescribed the medication for an indication, age group, dosage, or route of administration that is not approved by the regulatory agencies and is not mentioned in the prescribing information for the drug

definition.value: Indicates that the prescriber has knowingly prescribed the medication for an indication, age group, dosage, or route of administration that is not approved by the regulatory agencies and is not mentioned in the prescribing information for the drug

short.value: Indicates off-label use. Must be 'true' when .reason is provided.

definition.value: Indicates off-label use. Must be 'true' when .reason is provided.

short.value: Reason or related clarification for off-label use

definition.value: Reason or related clarification for off-label use

short.value: Additional information or comments, e.g. message to the dispenser

definition.value: Additional information or comments, e.g. message to the dispenser

short.value: Medication prescription model obligations

definition.value: Obligations for the logical model for medication prescription body for prescribing systems (producer) and dispensing systems (consumer).

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL process the patient information for identification purposes.
For a single-item prescription these identifiers SHALL match prescriptionItem.identifier.
System SHALL use this prescription identifier for reference in the dispense record.
System SHALL support at least EHDSHealthProfessional data type for the element.
System SHALL process the prescription status together with other information to determine dispensability.
System SHOULD be able to provide a rendered, human-readable version of the prescription.
For a single-item prescription these identifiers SHALL match .identifier.
System SHALL use this prescription identifier for reference in the dispense record.
System SHALL process the prescription status together with other information to determine dispensability.
System SHALL support at least the boolean data type.
System SHALL support at least the boolean data type.
